messages.content:
Evaluate the following player attack:
"你那薪水要養幾胎？隔壁小明都買房了，你還在啃老。"

Return JSON only.
{"damage": 35, "referee_comment": "沒力氣罵人就閉嘴"}

Evaluate the following player attack:
"小明都要結婚了，你還是單身狗一個喔？"

Return JSON only.
{"damage": 15, "referee_comment": "這酸味連裁判都聞到了"}

Evaluate the following player attack:
"那你找不找得到老婆啊？人家都買房了，你還在吃泡麵。"

Return JSON only.
